title: Add atomic repair record CLI
description: Improvement-backlog follow-up: add MAP_System/scripts/map_repair.py as a thin file-lock based repair-record CLI with atomic --repair-id auto allocation, following the proven REPAIR-0005 fcntl pattern. No SQLite dependency for repair ID allocation.
acceptance_criteria: map_repair.py can create repair records with explicit IDs and atomic --repair-id auto allocation under a file lock.
The implementation uses a file-lock/fcntl pattern and does not use SQLite for repair ID allocation.
Focused tests cover explicit create, auto allocation, and concurrent/no-collision behavior.
validate_task_mirrors, validate_events --fail-on-new, and relevant tests pass.
